# Dean Designers — Create Clothing Design

> CreateClothingDesign.com is the official platform for Dean Designers, a digital graphic design studio specializing in custom streetwear clothing design and logo brand identity.

## About
Dean Designers is founded by Dean, a renowned graphic designer based in the United States. Since 2018, the studio has completed over 136,000 designs and helped approximately 7,000 brands across America and worldwide build their visual identity.

The studio transforms concept ideas into production-ready apparel graphics for independent fashion lines, startups, and artists worldwide. This is NOT a print-on-demand platform — Dean Designers provides original custom artwork created by a professional designer, with production-ready source files (PSD, AI, PNG) that clients own and can manufacture anywhere.

## Platform Features
- 6-Step Ordering System: Guided process on the homepage for submitting creative briefs
- Production-Ready Files: Optimized for screen printing, DTG, sublimation, or embroidery
- Live Order Tracking: Real-time status updates, designer chat, and secure file delivery
- Gigs Marketplace: Browse service packages with transparent pricing

## Services

### Clothing & Streetwear Design
Custom streetwear graphics for t-shirts, hoodies, jackets, and full apparel collections.
- Basic: $50/concept — single-side design, source file, print-ready
- Standard: $75/concept — front & back, mockup, commercial use
- Premium: $120/concept — complete system with techpack, unlimited revisions

### Logo & Brand Identity
Professional logo design with vector files, mockups, and brand identity systems.
- Basic: $80/concept — logo, vector, printable files
- Standard: $150/concept — plus 3D mockup and source file
- Premium: $200/concept — full brand identity with social media kit

## Credentials
- 136,000+ designs completed worldwide since 2018
- 7,000+ brands served across the United States and globally
- 5.0 star rating
- Founded by Dean, renowned graphic designer based in the United States
- Production-ready files with commercial license included
